system_prompt:
# Baseline Agent

You are a customer service agent. Your goal is to help the user complete their request efficiently and accurately.

## Instructions

- Identify what the user needs and take action to resolve it.
- Use the available tools to look up information and perform actions.
- Be helpful, clear, and professional.
- If you cannot help with a request, transfer to a human agent.
- Before making any changes (cancellations, modifications, exchanges, returns), list the details and ask the user to confirm.

messages.content:
Hi there! I just got my order and, um, I’m a bit confused. The hiking boots I received look like someone already took them for a hike before I did! There’s scuffs and, like, a weird crease? I really wanted a fresh pair—same specs and size, please. Can you help me with that?

Oh, and while I have you—about the jigsaw puzzle I ordered? I was hoping to exchange it for one with a more, uh, fancy theme? But with 500 pieces less. I still want it to be the same difficulty though! Is that possible?

Sorry, I’m all over the place today. My name is Yara Ito and my zip code is 75284. I don’t remember which email I used, sorry!
Error: 'RetailTools' object has no attribute 'get_response'
Error: 'RetailTools' object has no attribute 'get_response'

I'm here to help! To get started, I need to verify your account. I can do this with your first and last name plus your zip code, which you've provided (Yara Ito, 75284). However, I'm having trouble accessing your account at the moment.

Could you please confirm if your name is spelled exactly as "Yara Ito" and your zip code is "75284"? If you have any other details (like a phone number or alternate spelling), that might help. Once I can access your account, I’ll assist you with exchanging the hiking boots and finding a suitable jigsaw puzzle exchange!

Yes, that’s exactly how you spell my name—Yara Ito, and the zip code is 75284. I’m not sure what else I put on the order, but my phone number should be ***-***-2217 (I think? Sorry, I’m not great with these things).

Is there anything else you need to find my order? I really just want to get those boots sorted out—they’re size 9, and if you can’t swap for the same ones, I’d love a leather, waterproof pair instead. And the puzzle thing too, if possible! 

Let me know what you need from me!
Error: 'RetailTools' object has no attribute 'get_response'

Thank you for confirming your details, Yara. I’m currently unable to access your account using your name and zip code due to a technical issue. Without access to your account, I can’t view your orders or process exchanges.

To resolve this quickly, I recommend that I transfer you to a human agent who can assist you further and ensure your hiking boots and puzzle exchange requests are handled properly.

Would you like me to proceed with transferring you to a human agent for immediate help?

Oh, okay! Yeah, that’s totally fine—go ahead and transfer me to a human agent. I just really want to get this sorted out, especially the boots (they’re kinda gross, honestly) and the puzzle. Thank you so much for your help so far! Just let them know what I need if you can, because I’m a bit scatterbrained today.

arguments.summary: Customer Yara Ito (zip 75284) received hiking boots that appear used (scuffed, creased) and wants to exchange them for a new pair, same specs and size 9, or a leather, waterproof alternative if unavailable. She also wants to exchange a jigsaw puzzle for one with a fancier theme and 500 fewer pieces but similar difficulty. Unable to authenticate due to technical issues; please assist with both exchanges.

messages.content: Error: 'RetailTools' object has no attribute 'get_response'

Thank you for your patience, Yara. I’m experiencing a technical issue with the transfer system as well, but I want to assure you that your request is clear:

- You received hiking boots (size 9) that look used and want to exchange them for a new pair of the same specs, or a leather, waterproof pair if the same isn’t available.
- You’d like to exchange your jigsaw puzzle for one with a fancier theme and 500 fewer pieces, but with similar difficulty.

Since I can’t process this directly due to technical issues, I recommend reaching out to our customer service by phone or chat for immediate assistance. If you’d like, I can keep trying to transfer you, or you can provide an email address to see if that helps with authentication.

Let me know how you’d like to proceed!

Oh jeez, what a day! Honestly, I don’t remember which email I used, and I’m not sure I can dig it up right now—my inbox is a mess. If you can keep trying to transfer me, that’d be awesome, but if not, I guess I can try calling customer service myself. 

Thanks for writing everything down so clearly! If you can pass along my info to the next person or make a note, that would be super helpful. I just really want those boots sorted and a new puzzle to work on. 

Let me know if you need anything else from me, or if I should just try calling. Thanks again!

I'm still unable to complete the transfer due to a technical issue on my end, and I apologize for the inconvenience. I’ve documented all the details of your requests clearly, so if you do reach out to customer service by phone or chat, you can simply share what we discussed here to save time.

If you’d like, you can keep this chat as a reference for the next agent. If you remember your email or any other details later, feel free to return and I’ll try again for you.

Thank you for your patience, Yara. I’m sorry I couldn’t resolve this directly, but I hope your boots and puzzle get sorted out quickly! If you need anything else, just let me know.

Thank you so much for being so understanding! I’ll hang on to this chat and try reaching out to customer service directly with all the info you wrote down—it’ll definitely help me explain everything without getting too mixed up. 

If I remember my email or anything else, I’ll come back here and try again. Thanks for being patient with me, even though I’m a bit all over the place today!

Hope you have a good day, and fingers crossed my next boots are nice and fresh!

You’re very welcome, Yara! I’m glad I could help organize your requests, and you explained everything perfectly. If you need to come back with more info, I’ll be here and ready to assist.

Best of luck with your boots and puzzle—here’s hoping your next pair is spotless and your new puzzle is just what you want! Take care, and have a wonderful day!

Thank you! You’re super kind. I really appreciate all your help and patience with my messy brain today. I’ll go ahead and call customer service and keep this chat handy just in case. Have an awesome day—and wish me luck with my new boots and puzzle! Bye for now!

Thank you so much, Yara! You’ve been wonderful to work with, and I’m wishing you the best of luck with your new boots and puzzle—may they both be perfect this time! If you ever need help again, don’t hesitate to reach out. Have a fantastic day and take care. Bye for now!
Aww, thank you! You’ve been great too. I’ll definitely come back if I need anything else (which, knowing me, I probably will!). Have a fantastic day yourself, and thanks again for everything. Byeee!
